summary: Workers Compensation policy covering employer liability for workplace injuries. Highly regulated with state-specific benefit schedules, class codes, and experience modification factors. Complex jurisdictional compliance requirements.

schemaEntities.description: WC line entity. Custom: ExperienceModFactor, NCCICarrierCode, RiskID, SICCode, RetroBillingPlan, DividendPlanFlag.
NCCI/state class code entity. Custom: ClassCode, ClassDescription, HazardGroup, ManualRate, ExpModBase, StateSpecificRate, PayrollBasis, FullTimeEquivalents, SubcontractorFlag.
Work location entity. Custom: StateCode, RatingGroup, ManagedCareFlag, SafetyProgramCredit, LossSensitiveFlag.
158 rules: NCCI class code validity, experience mod calculation, multi-state coordination, retro premium plan eligibility, USL&H eligibility by SIC, stop-gap state list.
Custom experience modification factor calculator. Integrates NCCI e-mod data feed. Non-standard for GW Cloud migration.

relationships.note: Multiple class codes per policy -- NCCI class code validation critical
Class codes assigned per location -- multi-state coordination logic
E-mod integration via NCCI data feed -- requires rebuild for GW Cloud
158 rules include class code eligibility and state-specific rate validation

migrationIssues.detail: WCExperienceModPlugin integrates with NCCI data feed for experience modification factors. GW Cloud has no native NCCI integration -- requires new external API connector.
31 state-specific benefit schedule rate tables. GW Cloud WC module supports standard NCCI states but 6 monopolistic state funds (ND, OH, WA, WY) require custom handling.
WCClassCode_WCLine has 9 custom fields. GW Cloud ClassCode entity supports partial equivalence -- HazardGroup, ManualRate, and StateSpecificRate require extension.
Custom retrospective rating and dividend plan logic in Gosu. GW Cloud does not natively support retro billing -- requires custom rating plugin or external system.
Multi-jurisdiction class code assignment and premium allocation. GW Cloud WC supports multi-state but custom state priority and allocation rules need migration.
USL&H endorsement eligibility based on SIC codes. GW Cloud supports USL&H coverage -- SIC-based eligibility rules need reconfiguration.

cloudMapping.action: Field exists in GW Cloud but NCCI data feed integration requires rebuild
Direct mapping -- GW Cloud native field
TypeKey mapping required -- NCCI hazard group codes
Build new NCCI e-mod API integration for GW Cloud
Retro plan validation not supported in GW Cloud -- custom plugin required
